Treatment_adverse_event.description: Counts of adverse event (Yes/No) in the treatment group. This variable and Control_adverse_event represent the same outcome (adverse event) measured in different groups (treatment vs. control).

Control_adverse_event.description: Counts of adverse event (Yes/No) in the control group. This variable and Treatment_adverse_event represent the same outcome (adverse event) measured in different groups (treatment vs. control).
